synced:
[00:17.13] I had a dream
[00:20.48] I got everything I wanted
[00:25.27] Not what you'd think
[00:28.85] And if I'm bein' honest
[00:30.79] It might've been a nightmare
[00:34.73] To anyone who might care
[00:38.65] 
[00:41.27] Thought I could fly (fly)
[00:44.66] So I stepped off the Golden, mm
[00:49.25] Nobody cried (cried, cried, cried, cried)
[00:52.73] Nobody even noticed
[00:54.85] I saw them standing right there

[01:05.20] I had a dream

[01:11.77] But when I wake up, I see
[01:16.02] You with me
[01:19.38] And you say
[01:20.75] "As long as I'm here, no one can hurt you
[01:28.51] Don't wanna lie here, but you can learn to

[01:44.21] You wouldn't wonder why you hear, 'They don't deserve you'"
[01:53.27] I tried to scream
[01:56.59] But my head was underwater
[02:01.29] They called me weak

[02:06.92] Could've been a nightmare
[02:10.53] But it felt like they were right there
[02:15.58] And it feels like yesterday was a year ago
[02:19.76] But I don't wanna let anybody know

[02:27.70] And I don't wanna let 'em down
[02:33.30] I had a dream
[02:36.52] I got everything I wanted
[02:39.78] But when I wake up, I see
[02:43.85] You with me
[02:47.22] And you say

[02:56.42] Don't wanna lie here, but you can learn to
[03:04.59] If I could change the way that you see yourself
[03:12.27] You wouldn't wonder why you hear, 'They don't deserve you'"
[03:19.95] If I knew it all then, would I do it again?
[03:24.24] Would I do it again?
[03:28.11] If they knew what they said would go straight to my head
[03:32.35] What would they say instead?
[03:36.00] If I knew it all then, would I do it again?
[03:40.28] Would I do it again?
[03:44.06] If they knew what they said would go straight to my head
[03:48.38] What would they say instead?
[03:48.84]
plain:
I had a dream
I got everything I wanted
Not what you'd think
And if I'm bein' honest
It might've been a nightmare
To anyone who might care

Thought I could fly (fly)
So I stepped off the Golden, mm
Nobody cried (cried, cried, cried, cried)
Nobody even noticed
I saw them standing right there
Kinda thought they might care (might care, might care)

I had a dream
I got everything I wanted
But when I wake up, I see
You with me

And you say
"As long as I'm here, no one can hurt you
Don't wanna lie here, but you can learn to
If I could change the way that you see yourself
You wouldn't wonder why you hear, 'They don't deserve you'"

I tried to scream
But my head was underwater
They called me weak
Like I'm not just somebody's daughter
Could've been a nightmare
But it felt like they were right there

And it feels like yesterday was a year ago
But I don't wanna let anybody know
'Cause everybody wants something from me now
And I don't wanna let 'em down

I had a dream
I got everything I wanted
But when I wake up, I see
You with me

And you say
"As long as I'm here, no one can hurt you
Don't wanna lie here, but you can learn to
If I could change the way that you see yourself
You wouldn't wonder why you hear, 'They don't deserve you'"

If I knew it all then, would I do it again?
Would I do it again?
If they knew what they said would go straight to my head
What would they say instead?

If I knew it all then, would I do it again?
Would I do it again?
If they knew what they said would go straight to my head
What would they say instead?
